summary: Tested 3 new features: Job Transfer Timeline, Shift End Koli Tracking, and Auto-resume on Shift Start. All backend tests passed (8/8). Frontend UI verified for timeline toggle, remaining koli display in shift end dialog, and shift start toast.

issues: Active job card shows 'Koli: 30' but doesn't show remaining_koli (12) prominently. Consider adding 'Kalan: 12 / 30' display for partially completed jobs.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add remaining_koli display to OperatorFlow active job section (currently only shows total koli_count)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_AutoResume_Verify job to test auto-resume feature (deleted after test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 new features fully tested and working: 1) Transfer Timeline - 'Et Yiyelim' job has 1 transfer history entry (33x33 ICM → 40x40 ICM), timeline toggle works in PlanFlow. 2) Remaining Koli Tracking - Shift end dialog shows 'Hedef: 12 koli (Toplam: 30)' for Laluna job. 3) Auto-resume - Verified with test job, resumed_jobs count returned in shift start response. Laluna job is currently in_progress on 33x33 ICM with completed_koli=18, remaining_koli=12.

details: Transfer history preserved when job is split
'Et Yiyelim' job has 1 transfer entry: 33x33 ICM → 40x40 ICM
Timeline toggle 'Aktarma Geçmişi (1)' shows in PlanFlow
Expanded timeline shows from_machine → to_machine, date, user
ManagementFlow shift end dialog shows 'Hedef: 12 koli (Toplam: 30)' for Laluna
OperatorFlow shift end dialog shows original_koli when different from target_koli
POST /api/shifts/start auto-resumes pending jobs with completed_koli > 0 and remaining_koli > 0
Shift start response includes resumed_jobs count
Auto-resumed jobs set machine status to 'working'
ManagementFlow shows toast 'Vardiya başlatıldı! X iş otomatik devam etti.' when resumed_jobs > 0
